query: What are the major phases, decision points and associated fees, if any, in the NYISO generation interconnection cluster study process?
final_answer:
The NYISO generation interconnection Cluster Study Process was established in OATT Attachment HH (effective May 21, 2024) and replaces the prior Class Year/feasibility/SIP process with a single, two-phase clustered study. Below are the major phases, decision points, and associated fees. ## I. Pre-Study / Application Phase | Element | Standard Process | Transition Cluster (2024) | |---|---|---| | **Application Window** | 45 calendar days | 75 calendar days (Aug. 1 – Oct. 15, 2024) | | **Validation** | NYISO validates within 10 business days; customer has 10 business days to cure deficiencies | 15 business days to validate / 15 business days to cure | | **Cluster member list** | Published within 10 business days of validation | Same | **Entry fees and deposits required with the Interconnection Request** (OATT Attachment HH § 40.5; NYISO Transition Cluster Notice, July 1, 2024; NYISO Cluster Study Process Overview): - **Application Fee** (non-refundable, cash only): - **$10,000** for a full Interconnection Request - **$5,000** for a CRIS-Only Request (75% allocated to NYISO, 25% to Connecting/Affected TOs per NYISO Technical Bulletin) - **Study Deposit (SD)** (cash, letter of credit, or surety bond): - **< 80 MW:** $100,000 - **≥ 80 MW and < 200 MW:** $150,000 - **≥ 200 MW:** $250,000 - **CRIS-Only:** $50,000 - Other submission requirements: single Point of Interconnection, conceptual one-line diagram, project layout, workable project models, site-control demonstration, and NYSRC Reliability Rule B.5 attestation for inverter-based resources > 20 MW. ## II. Customer Engagement Window | Element | Standard Process | Transition Cluster | |---|---|---| | **Duration** | 70 calendar days (overview figure shows 60 days; tariff/Phase 1 report states 70) | 90 calendar days | Activities during this window (OATT § 40.7; NYISO SIP FAQ): - NYISO publishes the cluster member list. - Connecting Transmission Owner conducts a **Physical Infeasibility Screen**. - NYISO hosts a **Scoping Meeting** for the cluster. - Limited Point-of-Interconnection changes are permitted within 5 business days of the cluster list. ## III. Phase 1 Study | Element | Standard Process | Transition Cluster | |---|---|---| | **Trigger** | Phase 1 Entry Decision Period | Same | | **Duration** | 180 calendar days (overview) / 190 calendar days (Phase 1 report) | 190 calendar days | **Decision Point 1 – Phase 1 Entry Decision Period** - **Timing:** 5 business days after the Customer Engagement Window. - **Action:** Interconnection Customer elects whether to proceed to Phase 1 Study. - **Fee/Deposit:** Must post **Readiness Deposit 1 (RD1)** of **$4,000/MW** (not applicable to CRIS-only projects). **What Phase 1 does** (OATT § 40.10; Transition CS2024 Phase 1 Cost Estimates Summary Report): - Performed individually for each project (except CRIS-only projects). - Identifies and estimates costs for: - Connecting Transmission Owner Attachment Facilities (CTOAFs) - Distribution Upgrades - Local System Upgrade Facilities (Local SUFs) - Includes design, preliminary engineering, and preliminary construction schedule. - Concludes with the Operating Committee’s approval of the **Phase 1 Cost Estimates Summary Report**. ## IV. Phase 2 Study | Element | Standard Process | |---|---| | **Trigger** | Phase 2 Entry Decision Period | | **Duration** | 270 calendar days | **Decision Point 2 – Phase 2 Entry Decision Period** - **Timing:** 10 business days after Phase 1 Study. - **Action:** Interconnection Customer elects whether to proceed to Phase 2 Study. - **Fee/Deposit:** Must post **Readiness Deposit 2 (RD2)**, equal to the greater of: - RD1, or - **20% of the Phase 1 cost estimate** for Local SUFs and CTOAFs. **What Phase 2 does** (OATT § 40.11; NYISO SIP FAQ; Transition CS2024 report): - Performed collectively for all Cluster Study Projects. - Conducts Cluster Baseline Assessment (CBA) and Cluster Project Assessment (CPA). - Identifies **System Upgrade Facilities (SUFs)** and **System Deliverability Upgrades (SDUs)** required for reliable interconnection and CRIS. - Allocates costs among contributing projects. - May trigger an **Additional SDU Study** if new deliverability upgrades are identified. - Concludes with the Operating Committee’s approval of the **Cluster Study Report**. ## V. Final Decision Period (Post-Phase 2) **Decision Point 3 – Final Decision Period** - **Timing:** After approval of the Cluster Study Report. - **Action:** Through iterative decision rounds, each Interconnection Customer elects whether to: - Accept its **Project Cost Allocation**, and - **Pay cash or post Security** for CTOAFs, Distribution Upgrades, SUFs, and SDUs. - **Security amount:** **100% of the cost estimate** of SUFs, SDUs, and CTOAFs identified in Phases 1 and 2. Projects that accept and post Security proceed to negotiation of the Standard Interconnection Agreement and any construction agreements. Projects that do not accept or post Security are withdrawn and may be subject to withdrawal penalties. ## VI. Withdrawal Penalties A project that withdraws at various decision points may forfeit all or part of its Study Deposit and Readiness Deposits (NYISO Cluster Study Process Overview; OATT §§ 40.7.6, 40.10.9, 40.15.5): | Withdrawal Point | Penalty | |---|---| | **WP1** – After Phase 1 Entry Decision Period | 25% of Study Deposit, **except**:
• $5,000 if interconnection is physically infeasible, or
• $0 if project withdraws within 5 business days of the cluster member list posting. | | **WP2** – After Phase 2 Entry Decision Period | 50% of Study Deposit + 10% of RD1, **except**:
• 25% of Study Deposit only if physically infeasible. | | **WP3** – After Final Decision Period | 100% of Study Deposit + 20% of RD2, **except**:
• 50% of Study Deposit only if physically infeasible, or
• 100% of Study Deposit only if total cost estimate (excluding SDUs) increases by more than 50% between Phase 1 and Phase 2. | Additionally, **up to 100% of posted Security may be forfeited** if other projects relied on the upgrades identified for the withdrawing project. ## VII. Summary Timeline | Phase | Standard Duration | Transition Duration | |---|---|---| | Application Window | 45 calendar days | 75 calendar days | | Customer Engagement Window | 70 calendar days | 90 calendar days | | Phase 1 Entry Decision Period | 5 business days | 5 business days | | Phase 1 Study | 180–190 calendar days | 190 calendar days | | Phase 2 Entry Decision Period | 10 business days | 10 business days | | Phase 2 Study | 270 calendar days | 270 calendar days | | Final Decision Period | Iterative | Iterative | ## Sources - NYISO OATT Attachment HH – Standard Interconnection Procedures, §§ 40.5, 40.7, 40.10, 40.11, 40.15 (effective May 21, 2024): https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/44769082/OATT%252040.2.pdf - NYISO, “NYISO’s Standard Interconnection Procedures FAQ” (SIP FAQ): https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/49802416/NYISOs-Standard-Interconnection-Procedures-FAQ.pdf - NYISO, “Cluster Study Process Overview” figure and deposit/penalty table (Dec. 14, 2023 OC meeting): https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/41716870/07b_NYISO%20Cluster%20Study%20Process%20Overview%20Figure_OC_30231214.pdf - NYISO, “Important Notice – Transition Cluster Study Process” (July 1, 2024): https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/1396587/Notice-of-the-Transition-Cluster-Study-Application-Window.pdf - NYISO, “Transition Cluster Study 2024 – Phase 1 Cost Estimates Summary Report” (Oct. 31, 2025): https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/54804583/03_Phase%201%20CTO%20Summary%20Report%20TPAS_OC%20Posting.pdf - NYISO Draft Technical Bulletin, “Transition Cluster Study Process”: https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/45683353/11b_Draft_Tech%20Bulletin_Interconnection_Cluster%20Study%20Overview.pdf

steps.content:
The NYISO generation interconnection Cluster Study Process was established in OATT Attachment HH (effective May 21, 2024) and replaces the prior Class Year/feasibility/SIP process with a single, two-phase clustered study. Below are the major phases, decision points, and associated fees. ## I. Pre-Study / Application Phase | Element | Standard Process | Transition Cluster (2024) | |---|---|---| | **Application Window** | 45 calendar days | 75 calendar days (Aug. 1 – Oct. 15, 2024) | | **Validation** | NYISO validates within 10 business days; customer has 10 business days to cure deficiencies | 15 business days to validate / 15 business days to cure | | **Cluster member list** | Published within 10 business days of validation | Same | **Entry fees and deposits required with the Interconnection Request** (OATT Attachment HH § 40.5; NYISO Transition Cluster Notice, July 1, 2024; NYISO Cluster Study Process Overview): - **Application Fee** (non-refundable, cash only): - **$10,000** for a full Interconnection Request - **$5,000** for a CRIS-Only Request (75% allocated to NYISO, 25% to Connecting/Affected TOs per NYISO Technical Bulletin) - **Study Deposit (SD)** (cash, letter of credit, or surety bond): - **< 80 MW:** $100,000 - **≥ 80 MW and < 200 MW:** $150,000 - **≥ 200 MW:** $250,000 - **CRIS-Only:** $50,000 - Other submission requirements: single Point of Interconnection, conceptual one-line diagram, project layout, workable project models, site-control demonstration, and NYSRC Reliability Rule B.5 attestation for inverter-based resources > 20 MW. ## II. Customer Engagement Window | Element | Standard Process | Transition Cluster | |---|---|---| | **Duration** | 70 calendar days (overview figure shows 60 days; tariff/Phase 1 report states 70) | 90 calendar days | Activities during this window (OATT § 40.7; NYISO SIP FAQ): - NYISO publishes the cluster member list. - Connecting Transmission Owner conducts a **Physical Infeasibility Screen**. - NYISO hosts a **Scoping Meeting** for the cluster. - Limited Point-of-Interconnection changes are permitted within 5 business days of the cluster list. ## III. Phase 1 Study | Element | Standard Process | Transition Cluster | |---|---|---| | **Trigger** | Phase 1 Entry Decision Period | Same | | **Duration** | 180 calendar days (overview) / 190 calendar days (Phase 1 report) | 190 calendar days | **Decision Point 1 – Phase 1 Entry Decision Period** - **Timing:** 5 business days after the Customer Engagement Window. - **Action:** Interconnection Customer elects whether to proceed to Phase 1 Study. - **Fee/Deposit:** Must post **Readiness Deposit 1 (RD1)** of **$4,000/MW** (not applicable to CRIS-only projects). **What Phase 1 does** (OATT § 40.10; Transition CS2024 Phase 1 Cost Estimates Summary Report): - Performed individually for each project (except CRIS-only projects). - Identifies and estimates costs for: - Connecting Transmission Owner Attachment Facilities (CTOAFs) - Distribution Upgrades - Local System Upgrade Facilities (Local SUFs) - Includes design, preliminary engineering, and preliminary construction schedule. - Concludes with the Operating Committee’s approval of the **Phase 1 Cost Estimates Summary Report**. ## IV. Phase 2 Study | Element | Standard Process | |---|---| | **Trigger** | Phase 2 Entry Decision Period | | **Duration** | 270 calendar days | **Decision Point 2 – Phase 2 Entry Decision Period** - **Timing:** 10 business days after Phase 1 Study. - **Action:** Interconnection Customer elects whether to proceed to Phase 2 Study. - **Fee/Deposit:** Must post **Readiness Deposit 2 (RD2)**, equal to the greater of: - RD1, or - **20% of the Phase 1 cost estimate** for Local SUFs and CTOAFs. **What Phase 2 does** (OATT § 40.11; NYISO SIP FAQ; Transition CS2024 report): - Performed collectively for all Cluster Study Projects. - Conducts Cluster Baseline Assessment (CBA) and Cluster Project Assessment (CPA). - Identifies **System Upgrade Facilities (SUFs)** and **System Deliverability Upgrades (SDUs)** required for reliable interconnection and CRIS. - Allocates costs among contributing projects. - May trigger an **Additional SDU Study** if new deliverability upgrades are identified. - Concludes with the Operating Committee’s approval of the **Cluster Study Report**. ## V. Final Decision Period (Post-Phase 2) **Decision Point 3 – Final Decision Period** - **Timing:** After approval of the Cluster Study Report. - **Action:** Through iterative decision rounds, each Interconnection Customer elects whether to: - Accept its **Project Cost Allocation**, and - **Pay cash or post Security** for CTOAFs, Distribution Upgrades, SUFs, and SDUs. - **Security amount:** **100% of the cost estimate** of SUFs, SDUs, and CTOAFs identified in Phases 1 and 2. Projects that accept and post Security proceed to negotiation of the Standard Interconnection Agreement and any construction agreements. Projects that do not accept or post Security are withdrawn and may be subject to withdrawal penalties. ## VI. Withdrawal Penalties A project that withdraws at various decision points may forfeit all or part of its Study Deposit and Readiness Deposits (NYISO Cluster Study Process Overview; OATT §§ 40.7.6, 40.10.9, 40.15.5): | Withdrawal Point | Penalty | |---|---| | **WP1** – After Phase 1 Entry Decision Period | 25% of Study Deposit, **except**:
• $5,000 if interconnection is physically infeasible, or
• $0 if project withdraws within 5 business days of the cluster member list posting. | | **WP2** – After Phase 2 Entry Decision Period | 50% of Study Deposit + 10% of RD1, **except**:
• 25% of Study Deposit only if physically infeasible. | | **WP3** – After Final Decision Period | 100% of Study Deposit + 20% of RD2, **except**:
• 50% of Study Deposit only if physically infeasible, or
• 100% of Study Deposit only if total cost estimate (excluding SDUs) increases by more than 50% between Phase 1 and Phase 2. | Additionally, **up to 100% of posted Security may be forfeited** if other projects relied on the upgrades identified for the withdrawing project. ## VII. Summary Timeline | Phase | Standard Duration | Transition Duration | |---|---|---| | Application Window | 45 calendar days | 75 calendar days | | Customer Engagement Window | 70 calendar days | 90 calendar days | | Phase 1 Entry Decision Period | 5 business days | 5 business days | | Phase 1 Study | 180–190 calendar days | 190 calendar days | | Phase 2 Entry Decision Period | 10 business days | 10 business days | | Phase 2 Study | 270 calendar days | 270 calendar days | | Final Decision Period | Iterative | Iterative | ## Sources - NYISO OATT Attachment HH – Standard Interconnection Procedures, §§ 40.5, 40.7, 40.10, 40.11, 40.15 (effective May 21, 2024): https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/44769082/OATT%252040.2.pdf - NYISO, “NYISO’s Standard Interconnection Procedures FAQ” (SIP FAQ): https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/49802416/NYISOs-Standard-Interconnection-Procedures-FAQ.pdf - NYISO, “Cluster Study Process Overview” figure and deposit/penalty table (Dec. 14, 2023 OC meeting): https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/41716870/07b_NYISO%20Cluster%20Study%20Process%20Overview%20Figure_OC_30231214.pdf - NYISO, “Important Notice – Transition Cluster Study Process” (July 1, 2024): https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/1396587/Notice-of-the-Transition-Cluster-Study-Application-Window.pdf - NYISO, “Transition Cluster Study 2024 – Phase 1 Cost Estimates Summary Report” (Oct. 31, 2025): https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/54804583/03_Phase%201%20CTO%20Summary%20Report%20TPAS_OC%20Posting.pdf - NYISO Draft Technical Bulletin, “Transition Cluster Study Process”: https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/45683353/11b_Draft_Tech%20Bulletin_Interconnection_Cluster%20Study%20Overview.pdf
